nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Daraz
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: General marketplace - electronics, fashion, groceries, home appliances
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: Selenium/Playwright (JS-rendered, anti-bot protection). Check Network tab for internal JSON API endpoints (e.g. /pdp/, /search/) as a faster alternative.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: robots.txt disallows /catalog/, /checkout/, /cart/, /customer/. Owned by Alibaba Group, has strongest anti-bot measures of the list.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Sastodeal
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: General marketplace - electronics, fashion, home goods, discounted items
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup (largely server-rendered); check for embedded JSON in <script> tags on product pages.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: One of Nepal's oldest ecommerce sites; has partnerships with Flipkart for imported fashion.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: HamroBazar
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Classifieds - new & used electronics, vehicles, real estate, fashion
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup (classified-ad style listings, lighter JS dependency).
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Functions like a classifieds board (OLX-style) rather than a traditional marketplace.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Gyapu
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: Selenium/Playwright (built on modern JS framework for app-like mobile experience).
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Popular for grocery delivery, grew rapidly during pandemic lockdowns.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Thulo.com
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: General marketplace - health, fashion, electronics, household items
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup; verify pagination pattern in URLs for full catalog crawl.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Broad product range, positioned as a general marketplace.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: OlizStore
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup for catalog pages; check individual product pages for JS-loaded pricing/EMI details.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Focused on genuine/authentic electronics with EMI plans and after-sales support.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: SmartDoko
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: General marketplace - wide range of consumer goods
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Backed by IMS Group, one of Nepal's established business houses.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Neshop
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: General marketplace - fashion, electronics, beauty products
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: Check DevTools Network tab for internal JSON API first; fallback to Playwright if content is JS-rendered.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Newer platform (0% seller commission model), fast-growing as of 2026.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Hukut
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Electronics & gadgets - laptops, smartphones, tablets, wearables, cameras, TVs, home appliances
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup for catalog pages; check product detail pages for JS-loaded pricing/stock (verify via DevTools first, as Cloudflare-hosted sites sometimes add bot-detection at the edge).
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Hosted behind Cloudflare - may add rate limiting or challenge pages if scraped aggressively. Also has a physical experience store in Newroad, Kathmandu.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Hardwarepasal
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Hardware & tools - power tools, hand tools, bathroom/computer/car hardware, building materials, paints, plumbing, cleaning essentials
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup - category-based catalog structure (e.g. /category/general-hardware), appears server-rendered based on page structure.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Marketplace model connecting multiple hardware suppliers; wide but niche-focused catalog (DIY/construction/industrial).

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Brother-Mart
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Electronics & gadgets - smartphones, smartwatches, earbuds, power banks, speakers, CCTV cameras, projectors, laptops, home appliances
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup likely sufficient for collection pages (e.g. /collections/all); site structure resembles Shopify - worth checking for a /products.json endpoint which would skip HTML parsing entirely.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Operating since 2016; also has EMI options, repair/exchange services, and an Android app. Site appears to run seasonal interactive promos (leaderboards, prediction games) that are JS-heavy but unrelated to product data.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Yantra Nepal
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Laptops & electronics - wide brand range (Apple, Acer, Asus, Lenovo, Dell, HP, MSI, Samsung, etc.), mobiles, accessories, wearables, audio
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup for catalog/category pages; product listing prices appear server-rendered based on page structure (visible pricing, discounts). Check for a WooCommerce/Shopify-style JSON export.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Launched 2021; positions itself as Nepal's largest laptop/electronics store with a very large multi-brand catalog - good candidate for price-comparison scraping.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Mobilemandu
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup likely sufficient for catalog pages; verify via DevTools whether pricing loads server-side or via JS/AJAX.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: General electronics store, smaller/newer catalog compared to Daraz or Yantra Nepal.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Neptronics
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Electronics & gadgets, plus retail/wholesale/repair services (phones, laptops, computers)
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup for catalog pages - smaller storefront, likely simpler server-rendered structure.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Smaller/independent electronics retailer with repair services alongside sales; catalog size likely modest compared to larger platforms.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Nagmani International
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Electronics - laptops, computer parts/peripherals, gaming consoles, mobile accessories (Dell, HP, Lenovo, Acer)
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup for catalog pages; verify exact domain/URL structure before scraping, as this is a smaller regional retailer.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Known for laptops and computer parts/peripherals; verify current domain before building a scraper, as smaller Nepali retailers occasionally change hosting/domains.

nepal_ecommerce_sites.name: Big Digital
nepal_ecommerce_sites.sells: Electronics - mobiles, tablets, laptops, computers, cameras/DSLRs, home appliances (TVs, refrigerators, washing machines), accessories
nepal_ecommerce_sites.method: requests + BeautifulSoup for catalog pages; verify exact URL/domain and rendering method (server vs JS) before scraping.
nepal_ecommerce_sites.notes: Broad electronics + home appliance catalog; verify current domain, as this profile was sourced from a third-party review rather than direct site inspection.

general_notes.before_scraping: Check each site's robots.txt and Terms of Service before scraping. Prefer official APIs where available.
general_notes.workflow: 1) Inspect Network tab in browser DevTools for internal JSON endpoints. 2) View page source to check if data is server-rendered or JS-injected. 3) Choose requests+BeautifulSoup for server-rendered pages, Selenium/Playwright for JS-heavy pages. 4) Always rate-limit requests and use realistic headers.
